creator: chuckr@glue.umd.edu
text:
On Mon, 13 Jan 1997, Peter Wemm wrote:

> "Jordan K. Hubbard" wrote:
> > > about it to guess.  Lars Koeller is the port author, and I wrote him, but
> > 
> > Great, then I'll assign this one to you! :-)
> 
> It also works perfectly on -current (I tested it there too from a 'make
> clean'). 
> 
> Did you build the package yourself, or did you get it via ftp?  If you got
> the package via ftp,  where did you get it? The package is out of date and
> needs to be rebuilt.  (Most likely Satoshi didn't rebuild top after some
> kernel structures changed).  If you build it by hand and it's failing, make
> sure you rebuild and reinstall libkvm.

Damn, you're right, I got it mixed up with xperfmon.  Top builds without a
burp!  It's xperfmon the Lars Koeller ported, and that has the if_var.h
problem.
